subject: [RFC PATCH v2 1/9] memcg: convert task->objcg to a per-node objcgs array

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch converts the task_struct's objcg field to a per-node array of obj_cgroup pointers, allowing for more efficient and accurate memory accounting across multiple NUMA nodes. The current_obj_cgroup() function is updated to index this array by numa_node_id(), and the current_objcg_update() function refreshes all entries in the array under an RCU read lock. The patch also introduces a new tagged pointer format for the obj_cgroup array, which preserves existing semantics with kmem_attach().
